productDisplayName: Highlander Men Black & White Checked Slim Fit Shirt
description: Composition100% cotton shirt with half sleeves, has plaid checks in black and white with red-grey accents, white stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket with embroidered logo on left chest, appliqued brand name on facing placket, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this plaid shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
